name: Crunch
description: Classic upper ab isolation by curling shoulders off the floor with knees bent.

name: Reverse Crunch
description: Lift hips off floor by curling knees toward chest to target lower abs.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: Hang from bar and lift legs to 90° or higher; advanced move for lower abs and hip flexors.

name: Plank
description: Isometric hold on forearms and toes; builds full-core stability and endurance.

name: Side Plank
description: Lateral plank targeting obliques and deep core stabilizers; can be modified or loaded.

name: Russian Twist
description: Seated rotational twist with or without weight to engage obliques and core control.

name: Bicycle Crunch
description: Dynamic crunch with alternating elbow-to-knee motion; targets upper/lower abs and obliques.

name: Dead Bug
description: Lie on back, extend opposite arm/leg while bracing core; enhances stability and coordination.

name: Flutter Kicks
description: Lie on back and alternate small leg kicks; targets lower abs and hip flexor endurance.

name: Cable Woodchop
description: Rotational cable pull from high to low or low to high; functional oblique and core movement.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
description: Roll forward from knees or feet using ab wheel; advanced full-core anti-extension challenge.

name: Mountain Climbers
description: Dynamic plank with alternating knee drives; combines cardio and core endurance.

name: Heel Tap
description: Lie on back, lift shoulders slightly and tap heels side to side; isolates obliques.

name: Bird Dog
description: Quadruped extension of opposite arm and leg; improves core stability and balance.

name: Hollow Hold
description: Lie on back, lift legs and shoulders off ground in a 'banana' shape; elite core isometric.
